response.global_analysis: The video features dialogue and game reactions from VTubers Matsuri, Towa, Zeta, and La+, followed by a recorded message from Kobo and a merchandise announcement by Zeta. No vocal music is present. I used the burnt-in subtitles during Kobo's segment as the primary guide for transcription/translation. For other parts, timing is strictly synchronized with vocal audio, and text is segmented to honor pauses and character limits.

subtitles.original: あー！
subtitles.english: Aah!

subtitles.original: 危ない！
subtitles.english: Look out!

subtitles.original: 危ない、危ない！
subtitles.english: Watch out, watch out!

subtitles.original: 怒り込んでる！
subtitles.english: He's getting angry!

subtitles.original: これまずいよ、これ！
subtitles.english: This is bad, this is!

subtitles.original: やっちゃった、やっちゃった...
subtitles.english: I did it, I did it...

subtitles.original: まずいよこれ！
subtitles.english: This is bad!

subtitles.original: 今まつりちゃんが3秒で撃ち抜いちゃったということは...
subtitles.english: Since Matsuri-chan shot it down in 3 seconds...

subtitles.original: あの多分もう次ゾンビはこの動きしちゃいけないなーっていう風になって...
subtitles.english: The zombie probably realized it shouldn't move like that next time...

subtitles.original: えー！やばい学習するタイプだ！
subtitles.english: Eh! Oh no, it's the type that learns!

subtitles.original: 学習しちゃいます。
subtitles.english: It learns.

subtitles.original: 学習ゾンビなんだ。
subtitles.english: So it's a learning zombie.

subtitles.original: ちょっと待って、じゃあ次ラプ様先やる？
subtitles.english: Wait, then should La+ go next?

subtitles.original: 先やる、先やる！
subtitles.english: I'll go next, I'll go next!

subtitles.original: 主役が最後でしょー。
subtitles.english: The star comes last, right?
3, 2, 1, kaboom!

subtitles.original: スタート！
subtitles.english: Start!

subtitles.original: 当たるんかい！
subtitles.english: It hits?!

subtitles.original: なんで当たんだよ！
subtitles.english: Why did it hit?!

subtitles.original: あたまだけでいいよ！
subtitles.english: Just the head is fine!

subtitles.original: 撃て撃て撃て撃て！いいよいいよ、補給する！
subtitles.english: Shoot, shoot, shoot, shoot! Good, good, I'll resupply!

subtitles.original: 待ちなさい！
subtitles.english: Wait!

subtitles.original: 当たりそう、当たりそう！
subtitles.english: It's about to hit, it's about to hit!

subtitles.original: 頑張れ頑張れ！
subtitles.english: Hang in there, hang in there!

subtitles.original: 当たりそうだよ！あと5秒だよ！
subtitles.english: It's about to hit! 5 seconds left!

subtitles.original: あー！痛い痛い！
subtitles.english: Aah! It hurts, it hurts!

subtitles.original: そういうゲームになっちゃったじゃん！
subtitles.english: It turned into that kind of game!

subtitles.original: タイムアップ！
subtitles.english: Time's up!

subtitles.original: やばい、ちょっと途中我慢できなかった。ムカつきすぎて。
subtitles.english: Man, I couldn't hold back halfway. I got too annoyed.

subtitles.original: 最後の挑戦はゼータ！3、2、1、ゴー！
subtitles.english: The final challenge is Zeta! 3, 2, 1, go!

subtitles.original: スタート！
subtitles.english: Start!

subtitles.original: めっちゃ動く、めっちゃ動いてる！
subtitles.english: It's moving so much, it's moving a lot!

subtitles.original: めっちゃ動いてるよ！
subtitles.english: It's moving a lot!

subtitles.original: おー、すっげー！私も動くからな！
subtitles.english: Oh, awesome! I'm gonna move too!

subtitles.original: オッケーだ！いやいやこれ、本物サイズ？
subtitles.english: Okay! No way, is this life-sized?

subtitles.original: 頑張れ、頑張れ！あと1枚だよ！
subtitles.english: Go for it, go for it! Just one more!

subtitles.original: 当たらない！
subtitles.english: It won't hit!

subtitles.original: 顔いっちゃえ！あー危ない！
subtitles.english: Go for the face! Ah, watch out!

subtitles.original: すごかった、本当に。
subtitles.english: That was amazing, really.

subtitles.original: ポイントは... 2ポイントでしたー！
subtitles.english: The score... was 2 points!

subtitles.original: わー！すごーい！
subtitles.english: Whoa! Awesome!

subtitles.original: Guys! みんなー！
subtitles.english: Guys! Everyone!

subtitles.original: Should we see who got the most points in this fest?
subtitles.english: Should we see who got the most points in this test?

subtitles.original: おおー！で、めっちゃいい勝負。
subtitles.english: Ooh! And it's a very close match.

subtitles.original: まつりが12点。はい。で、トワちんが11点。
subtitles.english: Matsuri has 12 points. Yes. And Towa-chin has 11 points.

subtitles.original: はい。で、ゼータが10点。そしてラプラスが...
subtitles.english: Yes. And Zeta has 10 points. And La+ has...
14 points!
4 points! 4 points!

subtitles.original: ラプラスが最下位！
subtitles.english: La+ is in last place!

subtitles.original: ちょっと待って、1位のほう選んでよ。
subtitles.english: Wait, pick the one for 1st place.

subtitles.original: Wooow! Congrats! すごーい！おめでとー！
subtitles.english: Wooow! Congrats! Awesome! Congratulations!

subtitles.original: You guys did very well! みんな本当にとにかく頑張ったね！
subtitles.english: You guys did very well! Everyone really worked hard!

subtitles.original: And best of all, I'm glad everyone had fun.
subtitles.english: And best of all, I'm glad everyone had fun.

subtitles.original: I can't wait to see how much more you can improve
subtitles.english: I can't wait to see how much more you can improve

subtitles.original: your aiming skills in the future, like me.
subtitles.english: your aiming skills in the future, like me.

subtitles.original: おい。何何何？ちょっと...
subtitles.english: Hey. What, what, what? Hey...

subtitles.original: Um, I'm... I'm talking here.
subtitles.english: Um, I'm... I'm talking here.

subtitles.original: おい！こぼの話を聞いてよ！
subtitles.english: Hey! Listen to Kobo!

subtitles.original: Anyway, Zeta...
subtitles.english: Anyway, Zeta...

subtitles.original: You still have a long, long way to go to become a full-fledged secret agent, okay?
subtitles.english: You still have a long, long way to go to become a full-fledged secret agent, okay?

subtitles.original: Yeah, let's have a match one day!
subtitles.english: Yeah, let's have a match one day!

subtitles.original: Bye! See ya-!
subtitles.english: Bye! See ya!

subtitles.original: あ、まだあった、こっちだね。やばいやばい、まつりちゃんもよ。
subtitles.english: Ah, there was more, this way. Oh no, Matsuri-chan too.

subtitles.original: あー行くからね！
subtitles.english: Ah, here I go!

subtitles.original: ふぅ、あー。すごいゲームだった。びしょ濡れだよ。
subtitles.english: Phew, ah. That was a crazy game. I'm soaking wet.

subtitles.original: 濡れちゃったよ、水鉄砲で。すごかったね。
subtitles.english: I got wet from the water gun. It was crazy.

subtitles.original: びしょ濡れになっちゃった。
subtitles.english: I ended up soaking wet.

subtitles.original: 服も着替えなきゃ。
subtitles.english: I have to change my clothes too.

subtitles.original: でも今日は告知があるって聞いたんだけど...
subtitles.english: But I heard there's an announcement today...

subtitles.original: みんな準備できてる？
subtitles.english: Is everyone ready?

subtitles.original: ちょっとアドブレイクかな。
subtitles.english: Maybe a little ad break.

subtitles.original: では、告知です！お願いします！
subtitles.english: Now, here's the announcement! Please!

subtitles.original: じゃじゃーん！うわー、まぶしい！
subtitles.english: Ta-da! Wow, so bright!

subtitles.original: すごく輝いてる。エンジェルみたいな衣装。
subtitles.english: It's shining so much. An angel-like outfit.

subtitles.original: 可愛くない？天使のコスチューム。
subtitles.english: Isn't it cute? An angel costume.

subtitles.original: みんな私のこと怖いって言ってたけど...
subtitles.english: Everyone said they're scared of me, but...

subtitles.original: 今は怖くないでしょ？だって私...
subtitles.english: You're not scared now, right? Because I'm...

subtitles.original: 一番清楚な人だから。清楚ゼータ。
subtitles.english: The most "seiso" person. Seiso Zeta.

subtitles.original: 清楚ゼータ来た。
subtitles.english: Seiso Zeta is here.

subtitles.original: どう？可愛い？可愛いでしょ？
subtitles.english: How is it? Cute? It's cute, right?

subtitles.original: 真っ白だし。衣装も可愛いよね。
subtitles.english: It's pure white. The costume is cute too, right?

subtitles.original: Gimana guys? Karena kapan lagi bisa lihat Seiso Zeta ya guys.
subtitles.english: How about it guys? Because when else can you see Seiso Zeta, guys?

subtitles.original: Berkostum, ber-cosplay sebagai angel-angel gitu. Lucu, iya iya Zeta lucu lucu.
subtitles.english: Dressed up, cosplaying as an angel like that. Cute, yeah yeah, Zeta's cute cute.

subtitles.original: Aku mau, siapa yang mau? Aku aku!
subtitles.english: I want it, who wants it? Me, me!

subtitles.original: But we don't stop here because obviously there's gonna be so many more items.
subtitles.english: But we don't stop here because obviously there's gonna be so many more items.

subtitles.original: And we're gonna introduce them now.
subtitles.english: And we're gonna introduce them now.

subtitles.original: じゃあ、こちらをご覧ください！どうぞ！
subtitles.english: Now, please take a look at this! Here you go!

subtitles.original: じゃじゃーん！数えたら6個くらいかな？
subtitles.english: Ta-da! If I count them, there are about 6?

subtitles.original: すごくない？
subtitles.english: Isn't it awesome?
